approval_statement: I approve freezing the 9-record AU-CTH source population as the bounded empirical sample, including its exact artifact hash, unit ordering, duplicate-clustering rules, exclusions, sampling seed, and codebook version. This does not authorize publication, redistribution, legal conclusions, or population-wide inference.

sampling.prng: version-pinned deterministic PRNG required by protocol
sampling.unit_order: canonical frame order, then canonical unit digest
sampling.duplicate_clustering: NFC; lowercase; collapse whitespace; remove URL tracking parameters; exact normalized request hash; near-duplicate MinHash Jaccard >= 0.90 or normalized Levenshtein >= 0.92 with same request-family key
sampling.exclusions: No exclusions; inaccessible and excluded units remain in the frame ledger.
